---
Name: Standard Task
About: Feature, bug, refactor, enhancement, or documentation task
Title: "type: "
Assignee: ""
Labels: ""
Type: ""
Projects: "BackToLife"
---

<!--
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  FILLING THIS ISSUE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  TITLE — Rule 1
  Format : type: one short phrase
  Types  : feat · bug · fix · refactor · docs · enhancement
  Example: feat: Add daily screen time widget to home screen

  ASSIGNEE
  Select the developer responsible for this task.
  Leave blank if not yet decided.

  TYPE (GitHub Issue Type)
  Pick one:
    • Bug    — An unexpected problem or broken behaviour
    • Feature — A request, idea, or new functionality
    • Task   — A specific piece of work (most common)

  PROJECTS
  Always set to: BackToLife

  MILESTONE
  Leave blank — we do not use milestones.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  LABELS — Rule 5 (add one from each group before submitting)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  PLATFORM — which app does this affect?
    backend            Backend / API related
    parent app         Parent App related
    user app           User (child) App related

  OS — which operating system?
    android            Android environment only
    iOS                iOS environment only
    both iOS and android   Affects both mobile platforms
    (leave blank if backend-only)

  PRIORITY
    critical    Site is down or a core feature is broken
    high        Important for the next release
    medium      Standard task
    low         Nice-to-have / backlog

  SIZING (effort estimate)
    S     1–2 hours
    M     1–3 days
    L     A full week or more
    XL    More than two weeks

  TASK TYPE
    bug               Something isn't working
    feature           New functionality
    enhancement       New feature or request / improvement
    refactor          Cleaning up or restructuring code
    documentation     Improvements or additions to documentation
    good first issue  Good for newcomers

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  DESCRIPTION — Rule 2 (bilingual: English first, then Spanish)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
-->

**English:** <!-- What needs to be done and why? -->

**Español:** <!-- ¿Qué hay que hacer y por qué? -->

---

**Technical Specs**

<!--
  Required for anything that is not a trivial fix — Rule 3.
  List specific files, screens, endpoints, models, or logic constraints.
-->

- **File(s):**
- **Endpoint / Model / Screen:**
- **Logic constraints:**
- **Dependencies or blockers:**

---

## Related

<!-- Link related issues, PRs, or external references if applicable. -->

- Closes #
- Related: #
